boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?

final_answer: Execution release REL-AST-081 covers material, band, facility and PO but does not prove abstract hazard-control status required by STD-AST-081-P. Generic WARN-AST-081 remains visible.
